birthDate.description: Person birth date (YYYY-MM-DD), if totally unknown, leave empty, if month or day unknown, replace by 01

categories.description: List of occupations, professions, categories describing the person

parties.description: List of political parties the person has been part of. Include 'Gouvernement' if they were part of it

items.description: Political party the person has been part of, with start and end

start.description: Date since the person has been part of it (YYYY-MM-DD). If totally unknown, don't include this property, if month or day unknown, replace by 01

end.description: Date until the person has been part of it (YYYY-MM-DD). If totally unknown, don't include this property, if month or day unknown, replace by 01

wikidataId.description: Person wikidata ID, begin with a Q and followed by numbers

image.description: URL to the person's wikimedia image
